mapper.select: SELECT banner_id, title, image_url, link_url, position, sort_order, is_active, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM banners WHERE banner_id = #{bannerId}

SELECT banner_id, title, image_url, link_url, position, sort_order, is_active, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM banners WHERE position = #{position} AND is_active = true AND (start_date IS NULL OR start_date <= NOW()) AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= NOW()) ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT banner_id, title, image_url, link_url, position, sort_order, is_active, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM banners ORDER BY sort_order ASC, banner_id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT banner_id, title, image_url, link_url, position, sort_order, is_active, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM banners WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY sort_order ASC, banner_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE banners SET title = #{title}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, position = #{position}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE banner_id = #{bannerId}
mapper.select: SELECT profanity_id, word, category, severity, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM profanity_dictionary WHERE profanity_id = #{profanityId}
SELECT profanity_id, word, category, severity, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM profanity_dictionary WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY severity DESC, word ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE profanity_dictionary SET category = #{category}, severity = #{severity}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE profanity_id = #{profanityId}
mapper.select: SELECT toxicity_log_id, content_type, content_id, user_id, detected_words, toxicity_score, severity, action_taken, processed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM toxicity_logs WHERE toxicity_log_id = #{toxicityLogId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM toxicity_logs WHERE action_taken IS NULL
AND severity = #{severity}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO toxicity_logs ( content_type, content_id, user_id, detected_words, toxicity_score, severity, action_taken, processed_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{contentType}, #{contentId}, #{userId}, #{detectedWords}, #{toxicityScore}, #{severity}, #{actionTaken}, #{processedAt}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE toxicity_logs SET action_taken = #{actionTaken}, processed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE toxicity_log_id = #{toxicityLogId}
